title: Redcliffe Labs strengthens its footprint in Rajasthan with strategic acquisition of renowned diagnostic centre
summary: Redcliffe Labs, India’s fastest-growing diagnostics network, has further strengthened its leadership position in Rajasthan and North India through the strategic acquisition of a leading diagnostic centre in Ajmer. As part […]
thbAction: Pitch THB's diagnostics CRM to help labs manage doctor outreach, collection-center expansion, and B2B referral relationships while improving conversion and retention.
contentHtml:
The integrated facility can perform over 1,200 MRI scans and 1,500 CT scans each month while providing access to Redcliffe Labs' extensive portfolio of 3,600+ pathology tests 

Redcliffe Labs, India’s fastest-growing diagnostics network, has further strengthened its leadership position in Rajasthan and North India through the strategic acquisition of a leading diagnostic centre in Ajmer. As part of its inorganic roll-up strategy, the acquisition marks a significant milestone in the Company’s vision of building integrated diagnostic ecosystems that bring radiology, pathology, and preventive healthcare together under one roof. The facility will now operate as Redcliffe Medicentre Imaging & Labs, expanding access to advanced diagnostic services for patients across Ajmer and central Rajasthan.

With a network of 16 laboratories and over 150 collection centres across Rajasthan, Redcliffe Labs has built one of the state’s most extensive diagnostic networks. The acquisition strengthens its presence in Ajmer, a key healthcare hub serving a population of approximately 2.6 million. The centre is strategically positioned to serve patients not only from Ajmer but also from neighboring districts like Talwandi, Indra Vihar, Jawahar Nagar, Mahaveer Nagar, Vigyan Nagar, Keshavpura, Rajeev Gandhi Nagar, Dadabari, Shastri Nagar, Basant Vihar, and more, seeking access to high-quality diagnostics closer to home.

The acquisition significantly enhances Redcliffe Labs’ diagnostic capabilities by integrating advanced radiology infrastructure with its extensive pathology portfolio on a single platform. Redcliffe Medicentre Imaging & Labs is equipped with a 1.5 Tesla MRI, 128-slice CT Scan, Color Doppler, ECHO, TMT, Ultrasound, and X-Ray services, with the capacity to perform more than 1,200 MRI scans and 1,500 CT scans every month. Combined with Redcliffe Labs’ portfolio of over 3,600 pathology tests spanning biochemistry, hematology, immunoassays, clinical pathology, serology, hormones, genetics, and specialized diagnostics, the facility delivers a comprehensive end-to-end diagnostic experience.

Established in 2019, the centre has earned the trust of patients and clinicians across Ajmer and surrounding regions through its commitment to quality diagnostics and clinical excellence. Under the leadership of Dr Manish Seth, who is an alumnus of JLN Medical College, Ajmer & Founder, Medicentre Labs, the centre will continue to strengthen its patient-centric approach while advancing access to integrated radiology, pathology, and preventive healthcare services across Ajmer and Central Rajasthan.

The expansion reflects Redcliffe Labs’ preventive-first philosophy and its commitment to making quality diagnostics more accessible beyond metropolitan India. By bringing advanced imaging, pathology, and preventive health screening under one roof, the Company is enabling earlier risk detection, timely intervention, and better health outcomes for families across Tier 2 and Tier 3 markets. The acquisition further reinforces Redcliffe Labs’ mission of adding healthy years to lives by ensuring that quality healthcare is available closer to where people live.

Commenting on the acquisition, Aditya Kandoi, Founder & CEO, Redcliffe Labs said, “India’s healthcare challenge is no longer limited to treatment capacity; it is increasingly about identifying health risks before they become diseases. As lifestyle disorders, cardiovascular conditions, and metabolic diseases continue to rise, diagnostics is becoming the starting point of the healthcare journey rather than a support function within it. We believe the next decade of healthcare will belong to organizations that can bring pathology, radiology, technology, and preventive healthcare together in a connected ecosystem for better health every day.”

Dr Manish Seth, Chief Radiologist and Founder, Redcliffe Medicentre Imaging & Labs said, “Ajmer has evolved into an important healthcare hub for Central Rajasthan, yet access to integrated diagnostic services remains a growing need for patients across the region. This acquisition brings together deep local clinical expertise and Redcliffe Labs’ scale, technology, and pathology capabilities to create a more comprehensive diagnostic ecosystem. Our shared vision is to ensure that patients can access advanced imaging, pathology, and preventive healthcare services closer to home, without compromising on quality, accuracy, or convenience.”

Redcliffe now has a presence across multiple cities in Rajasthan, including Udaipur, Kota, and Ajmer.
